features: Suitable for all Air Wick plug in devices
description: Product Description Plug in refill Crisp linen and Lilac - Bring to life the crisp, cool elegance of fine linen, accented with the fragrant touch of wild lilac. Lasts up to 80-days* - * Based on 12 hours use per day at lowest setting. Ingredients Contains alpha-isomethyl ionone, rose ketone-4. May cause an allergic skin reaction. Harmful to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Contains methylenedioxyphenyl methylpropanal,ethyl 2,6,6-trimethylcyclohexa-1,3-ene-carboxylate, citronellol, dodecanal, linalyl acetate, citral, limonene, pentamethylheptenone, cinnamyl alcohol, nerol, eugenol, 2,4-dimethyl-3-cyclohexene carboxaldehyde, methyl octine carbonate. May produce an allergic reaction. Contains citral, alpha-iso-Methylionone, Acetyl cedrene, Dimethylcyclohex-3-ene-1-carbaldehyde (isomer mixture), 2,4-Dimethyl-3-cyclohexen-1-carboxaldehyde, 2-Methyl-3-(p-isopropylphenyl)propionaldehyde, delta-1-(2,6,6-Trimethyl-3-cyclohexen- 1-yl)-2-buten-1-one, (E)-1-(2,6,6-Trimethyl-2- cyclohexen-1-yl)-2-buten-1-one, Methoxy dicyclopentadiene carboxaldehyde, alpha-Methyl-1,3-benzodioxole-5-propionaldehyde, Isocyclocitral and Linalool. May produce an allergic reaction. Directions Classic Plug in Keep in upright position and insert the bottle in the plug in until a 'click' can be heard. Symphonia Scent after scent Insert fragrance bottles into the plug in by pushing bottles up into each side of the device until a 'click' can be heard. Plug in i-motion Keep in upright position and insert the bottle in the plug in until a 'click' can be heard. Only use Air Wick refills. See more
